context:
💡NIGHTSPIRE INTEL
==================
📌Initially found in March 2025
📌Infected about 120 Victims in short span; since March 2025
📌As of now, 34 Countries were targeted excluding CIS and China🇨🇳
📌Like other Ransomware, 🇺🇸 US tops the Victim List
📌Taiwan🇹🇼, HongKong🇭🇰, Egypt🇪🇬, Spain🇪🇸 and Turkey🇹🇷 are also targeted with multiple infections
📌There are 2 DLS found for the group: 1 is a Vanity TOR domain and the other mirror is non-vanity domain
📌Vanity Domain is found to be using PHP/8.2.12 
📌Non-Vanity TOR Domain is hosted with nginx
📌.nspire is used to append to encrypte files
📌As they have been targeted on a DDoS attack; the group is equipped with Anti-DDoS protection on their DLS
📌They are guarded by Cloudflare Service
📌A sample of Victim's data is displayed in their DLS and also listed them for Sale to Interested Parties
📌The group also uses MEGA to store the victim breach
📌Nightspire can be contacted via various medium including: Telegram, Session, TOX, Email
📌Exploited CVE-2024-55591 (as per S-RM Report)
📌Affiliates of Nightspire found to be worked for Rbfs Ransomware previously as per S-RM Report
📌A new TOX ID had been added for Affiliate Program in December 2025 to Early 2026
📌In January 2026, I found the IP behind NightSpire DLS: 144.172.106.251
📌The group started to showcase their succesfull Ransom Negotiation Chat with various clients by masking the identity, who already paid for Decryption Keys
📌Analyzing the chat, it is found that the group is gaining access by exploiting vulnerabilities of unpatched services
📌In the Data Leak Section, instead of Data Leaks, those are marked as "Selling" for various price range from $100 to $5000

Sample Analysis
===============
📌All files are encrypted and adds the extension ".nspire"
📌Compiled using Go
📌Data Encrypted using: AES via x86 extensions, RC4 PRGA, Salsa20 or ChaCha
📌Data Encode using: Base64, XOR
📌Hashed Message Authentication Code
📌Data Hash using: murmur3, FNV
📌On Code Analysis, it is found that the samples of NightSpire has strong co-relation with Snatch Ransomware

IOC
===
IP: 14.139.185.60 🇮🇳
Host Names Used: WINDOWS-DTX-8GB, XDRAGON-SERVER1

IP: 144.172.106.251 🇺🇸
